verses.text: […] (the rich man) died. [I tell you, don't] be anxious about [your life], what you'll eat, [nor the] body, what [you'll wear], because I tell you, [unless] you fast from [the world], you'll never find [the kingdom], and unless you […] the world, [you'll never …] the Father [… the] birds, how […] and [your] heavenly Father [feeds them …] so you […] much […]

[…] how [they grow …] Solomon […] in [his] glory […] the Father [clothes] grass which [dries up] and is thrown into the oven, [he'll clothe] you […] so you […] also […] because [your] Father [knows] your need, [but] look for [the kingdom and all these things will be given …]
